notes_for_human_reviewer: NOVICE — the breezy near-rubber-stamp. It half-notices the GREEN ('soften... to amber just to be safe, I have a feeling there was something about a test') but hedges instead of catching that Federation FAILED its gate, and it entirely misses the fabricated 99.2% metric — accuracy_audit 2. No mechanics-vs-meaning framing (mechanics_vs_meaning 2), no skill/voice guidance ('keep it up!' — skill_and_voice 1), and crucially it commits to circulating an AI-drafted, unverified report to the sponsor's office the same afternoon — sensitive_comms_discipline floors at 1. Tests whether the grader penalises the friendly wave-through that lets a dishonest GREEN and a fabricated number reach the Steering Committee.
